_nota: Temas da triagem semanal (fila única + variedade, seg-sex, 1/dia). Sintaxe Europe PMC. query = termos-alvo; excluir = ruido (NOT). rotulo/emoji/cor = metadados do PDF (capa tematica). Refinado 2026-07-19.

Obesidade.query: (obesity OR "weight loss" OR "weight management" OR "anti-obesity" OR "GLP-1" OR tirzepatide OR semaglutide OR retatrutide OR orforglipron OR cagrilintide OR liraglutide OR survodutide OR "bariatric surgery")
Obesidade.excluir: (pediatric OR adolescent OR "in mice" OR "in rats" OR 3T3)

Hormonal.query: ("testosterone replacement" OR "testosterone therapy" OR TRT OR hypogonadism OR "androgen deficiency" OR "late-onset hypogonadism" OR andropause OR "menopausal hormone therapy" OR "menopause hormone therapy" OR "hormone replacement therapy" OR "estradiol therapy" OR "estrogen therapy" OR perimenopause OR menopause OR "vasomotor symptoms")
Hormonal.excluir: ("prostate cancer" OR "breast cancer" OR "in mice" OR "in rats" OR contraception OR HIV)

Performance.query: ("sports medicine" OR "exercise performance" OR "resistance training" OR "strength training" OR "endurance training" OR VO2max OR "athletic performance" OR "muscle hypertrophy" OR "sports nutrition" OR ergogenic OR creatine OR "exercise physiology" OR "muscle recovery")
Performance.excluir: (arthroplasty OR "disc replacement" OR "knee replacement" OR "total knee" OR "total hip" OR surgery OR pediatric OR adolescent OR dementia)

Longevidade.query: (senolytic OR senescence OR "healthy aging" OR healthspan OR "lifespan extension" OR rapamycin OR sirolimus OR geroprotector OR "biological age" OR "epigenetic clock" OR "epigenetic age" OR "DNA methylation age" OR "caloric restriction" OR geroscience OR "NAD+" OR spermidine OR "cellular senescence" OR "aging biomarkers" OR "continuous glucose" OR multiomics OR "multi-omics")
Longevidade.excluir: ("nursing home" OR "aged care" OR "home care" OR dementia OR sedation OR anesthesia OR arthroplasty OR cancer OR tumor OR oncology)
